name: Modal
description: Overlay dialog for focused tasks, confirmations, or information that requires user attention before proceeding.

headerModal.description: Modal header with title, optional supporting text, featured icon, and divider.

featuredIcon.description: Shows a featured icon above or beside the title.

showSupportingText.description: Shows description text below the title.

showDivider.description: Shows a divider line below the header.

footer.description: Modal footer with action buttons. Reuses the Footer component.

headerType.description: Layout of the header — vertical stacks icon above title, horizontal places them side by side.

featuredIcon.description: Shows a featured icon in the modal header.

showSupportingText.description: Shows description text below the title in the header.

showDivider.description: Shows a divider line between the header and body.

do: Use for confirmations, focused form entry, or destructive action warnings
Always include a way to dismiss (close button or cancel action)
Keep modal content focused — one task per modal
dont: Don't nest modals inside other modals
Don't use modals for content that should be inline on the page

accessibility.keyboard: Focus is trapped within the modal. Escape closes the modal. Tab cycles through interactive elements.
